name: auto-git-workflow
description: Enforces structured git practices: conventional commits, branch-per-feature, automatic change summaries
author: Prismcode

tools.name: generateCommitMessage
tools.description: Analyzes staged changes and generates a conventional commit message following the Conventional Commits spec

scope.description: Optional scope of the change (e.g. api, cli, ui)

breaking.description: Whether this commit has breaking changes

tools.name: squashAndMerge
tools.description: Squashes all commits in the current branch into a single commit with a well-formatted message, then suggests merge strategy

branch.description: Target branch to merge into (default: main)
